subcodes.first_line: O thou who art destitute and bereft! In truth thou hast traversed mountain and desert, and from Iran hast journeyed unto the City of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بیسر و سامان من فی الحقیقه کوه و صحرا طی نمودی و از ایران بمدینه الله
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
